title: CPB Contractors Pty Limited — Environmental impact
investigation_objective: The NSW EPA fined CPB Contractors Pty Limited $45,000 for breaching Environment Protection Licence noise-mitigation conditions during night works on the NSW Government's publicly funded Warringah Freeway Upgrade, following an unannounced inspection - the EPA's own release notes this is the second such fine tied to the same project.
scope: Fined by the NSW EPA for breaching Environment Protection Licence noise-mitigation conditions; Breach occurred on a large, publicly funded transport infrastructure project; Second EPA fine of this kind tied to the same project, per the regulator's own release
